basic_details.job_title: ECHS Agra Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 25 Driver, Peon and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme Agra (ECHS Agra)
basic_details.post_name: Officer-In-Charge Polyclinic, Medical Officer, Dental Officer, Lab Assistant, Lab Technician, Nursing Assistant, Pharmacist, Dental Hygienist, Female Attendant, Peon, Chowkidar,, Driver
basic_details.short_information: The Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme Agra (ECHS Agra) has officially announced the Various Staff Recruitment 2026 with 25 openings. The detailed notification has been released on the official website. Candidates who meet the post-wise age criteria and hold the required qualifications including Graduate, MBBS, BDS, DMLT, B.Sc. (Medical Lab Technology), GNM, B.Pharmacy, Diploma in Pharmacy, 10+2, Matriculation, and other relevant qualifications can submit their offline applications on or before 10 August 2026. The shortlisted candidates will appear for the walk-in interview on 24 August

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Officer-In-Charge Polyclinic: 63/65, Medical Officer: 66/68, Dental Officer: 63/65, Lab Assistant: 56/58, Lab Technician: 56/58, Nursing Assistant: 56/58, Pharmacist: 56/58, Dental Hygienist: 56/58, Female Attendant: 53/55, Peon: 53/55, Chowkidar: 53/55, Driver: 53/55
age_limit.details: Officer-In-Charge Polyclinic: Minimum 63 years, Maximum 65 years. Medical Officer: Minimum 66 years, Maximum 68 years. Dental Officer: Minimum 63 years, Maximum 65 years. Lab Assistant: Minimum 56 years, Maximum 58 years. Lab Technician: Minimum 56 years, Maximum 58 years. Nursing Assistant: Minimum 56 years, Maximum 58 years. Pharmacist: Minimum 56 years, Maximum 58 years. Dental Hygienist: Minimum 56 years, Maximum 58 years. Female Attendant: Minimum 53 years, Maximum 55 years. Peon: Minimum 53 years, Maximum 55 years. Chowkidar: Minimum 53 years, Maximum 55 years. Driver: Minimum 53 years, Maximum 55 years.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate, MBBS, BDS, DMLT/Class I Lab Tech Course, B.Sc. (Med Lab Technology), Matriculation/Higher Secondary/Senior Secondary (10+2) with Science, Diploma in Medical Lab Technology, GNM Diploma/Class I nursing assistance course, B Pharmacy, 10+2 with Science stream, Diploma in Pharmacy, Diploma holder in Dental Hyg/ Class-I DH/DORA course, Literate, Class 8, GD trade (Armd Forces), Class-I MT driver (Armed Forces) with Civil driving Licence.
qualification.details: Officer-In-Charge Polyclinic: Graduate with Minimum 05 Yrs work experience in health care institutions or managerial positions. Medical Officer: MBBS with Minimum 03 years after internship. Preferable additional qualification in medicine/surgery. Dental Officer: BDS with Minimum 03 years work experience. Lab Assistant: DMLT/Class I Lab Tech Course (Armd Forces) with Minimum 05 years work experience in Laboratory. Lab Technician: B.Sc. (Med Lab Technology) or Matriculation/Higher Secondary/Senior Secondary (10+2) with Science from Recognized institution/Board. (ii) Diploma in Medical Lab Technology from Recognized Institution. Minimum 03 years experience as a lab assistant in a medical lab. Nursing Assistant: GNM Diploma/Class I nursing assistance course (Armd Forces) with Minimum 05 years experience. Pharmacist: B Pharmacy from a recognized Institute. or 10+2 with science stream (Physics, Chemistry, Biology) from a recognized Board And Approved Diploma in Pharmacy from an Institute recognized by the Pharmacy Council of India and registered as Pharmacist under the Pharmacy Act 1948. Minimum 03 years experience. Dental Hygienist: Diploma holder in Dental Hyg/ Class-I DH/DORA course (Armd Forces) with Minimum 05 years experience in Dental Laboratory. Female Attendant: Literate with Minimum 05 years experience in civil/Army health institutions. Peon: Education-class 8, GD trade (Armd Forces) with Minimum 05 years service. Chowkidar: Education-class 8 or GD trade for Armd Forces personnel with Minimum 05 years service. Driver: Education-8 Class. Class-I MT driver (Armed Forces) Posses of Civil driving Licence. Minimum 05 years work experience as Driver.

salary_details.pay_scale: Ranges from Rs. 21,800/- to Rs. 95,000/- per month.

selection_process: Shortlisting based on application Interview On Job Training (OJT)
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.echs.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-08-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: ECHS Agra Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the ECHS Agra Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download ECHS Agra Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Officer-In-Charge Polyclinic: Graduate with Minimum 05 Yrs work experience in health care institutions or managerial positions. Medical Officer: MBBS with Minimum 03 years after internship. Preferable additional qualification in medicine/surgery. Dental Officer: BDS with Minimum 03 years work experience. Lab Assistant: DMLT/Class I Lab Tech Course (Armd Forces) with Minimum 05 years work experience in Laboratory. Lab Technician: B.Sc. (Med Lab Technology) or Matriculation/Higher Secondary/Senior Secondary (10+2) with Science from Recognized institution/Board. (ii) Diploma in Medical Lab Technology from Recognized Institution. Minimum 03 years experience as a lab assistant in a medical lab. Nursing Assistant: GNM Diploma/Class I nursing assistance course (Armd Forces) with Minimum 05 years experience. Pharmacist: B Pharmacy from a recognized Institute. or 10+2 with science stream (Physics, Chemistry, Biology) from a recognized Board And Approved Diploma in Pharmacy from an Institute recognized by the Pharmacy Council of India and registered as Pharmacist under the Pharmacy Act 1948. Minimum 03 years experience. Dental Hygienist: Diploma holder in Dental Hyg/ Class-I DH/DORA course (Armd Forces) with Minimum 05 years experience in Dental Laboratory. Female Attendant: Literate with Minimum 05 years experience in civil/Army health institutions. Peon: Education-class 8, GD trade (Armd Forces) with Minimum 05 years service. Chowkidar: Education-class 8 or GD trade for Armd Forces personnel with Minimum 05 years service. Driver: Education-8 Class. Class-I MT driver (Armed Forces) Posses of Civil driving Licence. Minimum 05 years work experience as Driver.

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Officer-In-Charge Polyclinic: Minimum 63 years, Maximum 65 years. Medical Officer: Minimum 66 years, Maximum 68 years. Dental Officer: Minimum 63 years, Maximum 65 years. Lab Assistant: Minimum 56 years, Maximum 58 years. Lab Technician: Minimum 56 years, Maximum 58 years. Nursing Assistant: Minimum 56 years, Maximum 58 years. Pharmacist: Minimum 56 years, Maximum 58 years. Dental Hygienist: Minimum 56 years, Maximum 58 years. Female Attendant: Minimum 53 years, Maximum 55 years. Peon: Minimum 53 years, Maximum 55 years. Chowkidar: Minimum 53 years, Maximum 55 years. Driver: Minimum 53 years, Maximum 55 years.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Shortlisting based on application Interview On Job Training (OJT)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.echs.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-08-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for ECHS Agra Various Staff Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for the receipt of applications for ECHS Agra Various Staff Recruitment 2026 is 10 August 2026. Candidates must ensure their applications reach the specified address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in ECHS Agra Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 25 vacancies for various staff positions under the ECHS Agra Recruitment 2026. These vacancies are distributed across different posts as per the official notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for ECHS Agra Various Staff posts?
faq.answer: The application mode for ECHS Agra Various Staff posts is offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it, attach necessary documents, and send it by registered post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum qualification required for ECHS Agra jobs?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required for ECHS Agra jobs is 8th pass for certain posts like Peon, Chowkidar, and Driver. Other posts require qualifications such as Graduate, MBBS, BDS, or relevant diplomas.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for ECHS Agra Various Staff positions?
faq.answer: The age limit for ECHS Agra Various Staff positions varies by post. For example, Officer-In-Charge Polyclinic is 63-65 years, while Female Attendant, Peon, Chowkidar, and Driver are 53-55 years.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary for Various Staff posts at ECHS Agra?
faq.answer: The salary for Various Staff posts at ECHS Agra ranges from Rs. 21,800/- to Rs. 95,000/- per month, depending on the specific position. Medical and Dental Officers receive Rs. 95,000/-.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for ECHS Agra Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for ECHS Agra Recruitment 2026 includes shortlisting based on applications, followed by an interview. Some positions may also involve On Job Training (OJT) as part of the process.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for ECHS Agra Recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification for ECHS Agra Recruitment 2026 can be downloaded from the official website www.echs.gov.in. A direct link is also provided in the Important Links section of this article.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website of ECHS Agra?
faq.answer: The official website for Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme Agra (ECHS Agra) is www.echs.gov.in. Candidates can visit this site for more details and to download the application form.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any application fee for ECHS Agra Various Staff recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for ECHS Agra Various Staff recruitment. Candidates should always refer to the official document for any updates or specific instructions.
